ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for the benchmark */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm or method used */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the benchmark was run */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the benchmark result */,
  "instability" REAL /* Instability measure of the benchmark */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Execution time of the benchmark in milliseconds */,
  "average" REAL /* Average value of the performance metric */,
  "ci_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the average value */,
  "ci_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for the average value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the benchmark was executed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the benchmark result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Detailed settings of the configuration */,
  "hardware_spec" TEXT /* Detailed hardware specifications */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used for the benchmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, performance engineer, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the benchmark */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or tool used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)
